Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: I made a zero-copy coroutine tracer to find my scheduler's lost wakeups 39 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Graphics Programming Resources 158 upvotes, 14 comments
  3. Modern Illustration: Archive of illustration from c.1950-1975 42 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. Charging a three-cell nickel-based battery pack with a Li-Ion charger [pdf] 21 upvotes, 1 comments
  5. Show HN: Stacked Game of Life 115 upvotes, 23 comments
  6. Elevator Saga: The elevator programming game (2015) 64 upvotes, 11 comments
  7. MyFirst Kids Watch Hacked. Access to Camera and Microphone 23 upvotes, 2 comments
  8. Medical journal says the case reports it has published for 25 years are fiction 59 upvotes, 11 comments
  9. Libre Solar – Open Hardware for Renewable Energy 55 upvotes, 11 comments
  10. Qwen3.5 Fine-Tuning Guide – Unsloth Documentation 100 upvotes, 28 comments
  11. Toxic combinations: when small signals add up to a security incident 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. Motorola GrapheneOS devices will be bootloader unlockable/relockable 1046 upvotes, 421 comments
  13. A Visual Guide to DNA Sequencing 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  14. Did Alibaba just kneecap its powerful Qwen AI team? 79 upvotes, 23 comments
  15. Claude's Cycles [pdf] 719 upvotes, 304 comments
  16. Something is afoot in the land of Qwen 37 upvotes, 9 comments
  17. "It Turns Out" 95 upvotes, 33 comments
  18. RE#: how we built the fastest regex engine in F# 127 upvotes, 48 comments
  19. Better JIT for Postgres 119 upvotes, 49 comments
  20. RFC 9849. TLS Encrypted Client Hello 199 upvotes, 93 comments
  21. A CPU that runs entirely on GPU 184 upvotes, 89 comments
  22. Nobody Gets Promoted for Simplicity 449 upvotes, 249 comments
  23. Agentic Engineering Patterns 345 upvotes, 193 comments
  24. Chimpanzees Are into Crystals 58 upvotes, 29 comments
  25. Glaze by Raycast 111 upvotes, 64 comments
  26. Bet on German Train Delays 233 upvotes, 151 comments
  27. Greg Knauss Is Losing Himself 35 upvotes, 16 comments
  28. The one science reform we can all agree on, but we're too cowardly to do 74 upvotes, 42 comments
  29. Apple Introduces MacBook Neo 452 upvotes, 450 comments
  30. Jiga (YC W21) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments
